signals.headline: US Blockade of Iranian Ports Now in Effect After Failed Ceasefire Talks; Trump Claims Iran Wants Deal 'Very Badly' | NO
signals.raw:
US Blockade of Iranian Ports Now in Effect After Failed Ceasefire Talks; Trump Claims Iran Wants Deal 'Very Badly' | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The US Navy began blockading Iranian ports and the Strait of Hormuz at midnight AEST (around 2 PM ET April 13), following collapsed direct talks in Pakistan over the weekend, with no ceasefire agreement reached due to Iran's nuclear ambitions[1][2][3].  
Pre

signals.raw: March 2026 inflation rose to **2.2%** YoY (from 2.0% in Jan/Feb), below 2.4% forecasts; February held at **2.0%**. [1][2][3]

signals.raw: Analysts see no rate cuts soon due to core inflation stability, weak KRW, housing pressures, and oil shocks (prices ~$150/barrel impacting growth/inflation). [2][4][5][6]
